data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MIDNIGHT REX scored (25.77) last time out at this track in a Class 3 and will break from box 1 for the first time. Hard to go past form at this journey. Can measure up again. 4. TEXAS SNAKEBITE has a strong overall record having six wins and 16 places from 28 starts including a last start second (25.78) over 457m at this track. Solid record at this trip including five wins. Will go close here with a clear run. 6. OPAWA INGRID has mixed form recently, finishing fifth (25.95) in a Class 4/5 at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Rates a winning chance on best. 2. OPAWA TREVOR placed last start in slick time and is in the mix again. Steps back up to a middle distance which will suit.","runners":[1,4,6,2],"exclusive":false}
